title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Oden, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kinemon, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: March forward, step back Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, there are "Samura!" here?! aren't they too strong?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do not panic, we outnumber them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because his wife and children are in danger...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: MOMONOSUKE... HUM, LORD MOMONOSUKE IS ALREADY 8...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then it would be the end...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive my impudence, but I came to your aid!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must have forgotten, but when Lord Sukiyaki was still alive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I stayed on duty at the Palace because I had faith in the return of the Kozuki family, but...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Kozuki family and fuckurokuju's forces....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was my dream to be at your service, Lord Oden,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I couldn't stay at the Palace anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot blame them for losing faith in a "Fool of a Lord"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You did not choose the easiest path, Shinobu!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 29 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
